titleStmt.title: SII 30.254: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 254. (A.R. No. 605 of 1915.) Ēruvāḍi, Nanguneri Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the same boulder in the Iraṭṭaippottai Rock. Māṟañjaḍaiyaṉ: Year 43: 9th c. A.D.

summary.p: This is the highest regnal year found for Māṟañjaḍaiyaṉ. The rock on which this epigraph is engraved is very much weather-worn and the record is therefore defaced. It appears to register a gift of land by Irambāṭṭu-vēḷāṉ Sāttaṉ as paḷḷichchandam to the Bhaṭāra of Tiruviruttalai-Aruvāḷam in Naṭṭāṟṟuppōkku, and a gift of sheep for a lamp. A Tamil verse at the end of the record, stated to have been composed by the donor himself. This an exhortation to all to offer worship to Aruhan on the hill. The donor Irambāṭṭu-vēḷāṉ has figured in another record from Daḷapatisamudram dated in the 35+6th regnal year of this king.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. XIV, No. 41

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkomāṟañ caṭaiyaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 3 Ivvāṇṭu nāṭṭāṟṟuppokkut ti
ruviruttalai Aruvāḷattu paṭārakarkku paḷḷiccantamāka nāṭṭukku
ṟumpiṉ kiḻcceri pāppācāṉṟārey Ivvūroṅkaḷ pūmi ciṟṟeyiṟ kā
liṟ pirinta Arumaṇṇaṭaik kālāl nir Aṭṭu nel viḷaivaṉa Iḷamakkaḷ ce
ytaṭinnilam 2 10 2 viḷamperuṅkālāl nir Aṭṭu nel viḷaivaṉa kāṉam
taṭi 2 kāyalūrkkiḻāṉ taṭi 2 nilaṉ 4 Ikkolāl niraṭṭu nelviḷaivaṉa muta
cceri melatu taṭi nilaṉ 5 vakaiyil vayalil Atam peṟṟa ma ye
ṉeṉra kālāl nir Aṭṭu nel viḷaivatu kīḻppulac cey taṭi nilaṉ
Eṟṟittaṭi Oṉpatu nilaṉ va kāluṅ karaik kāṉa nāṭṭu Irampāṭṭu
veḷāṉ cāttaṉ pakkal Inilattālyiṟai vilaipporuḷ koṇṭu In
nilattāl Iṟaikkaṭaṉum vaḻiiṟai veṭṭi Evvakaippaṭṭatum nāṭ
ṭukkuṟumpiṟ kiḻccerip pāppācāṉṟome kāttūṭṭuvatākavum . I
ppūmi Ipparicey vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vi
laiyāvaṇap poruṭcelavolaiyākac ceytu kuṭuttom pāppācāṉṟāṉo
m veḷāṉ cāttaṉukku . Ipparicu Ippūmi kāttūṭṭuva Innila
yil Accañcu paḻaṅkācu vevveṟṟuvakai Iraṭṭi poruḷumaṟak
ṇattuttaṇṭamum paṭṭup piṉṉaiyum Ipūmi Ivva muṭṭāmal Aṭṭu
ṅkiḻccerip pāppācāṉṟāron tiruviruttalai Aruvāḷattu Ivvāṇṭu Itte
varkkey Ivaṉe vaitta tiruviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku niyati muṭṭāmal Aṭṭu
vitākap perumpaḻañci Irukkiṉṟa paṭaittalaivaṉ koṟaikkāṭaṉukku mu
ṅkoṉ māṟankuṭitāṅkiyum puṇaiyāka Aṭutta cāvā muvāpperāṭu Aimpatu śrītilakkika
ri . Antamil pal kuṇattāti Arukantaṉentamiṭar tirkku
ṉorāta muṉṉey tiruttalai toḻumiṉ ceṉṟu vantaṇa malar laiyetoḻumiṉ
tevar centiṉamalipoḻiṟ colai tikaḻvāṉantaṭavu yuḷivantu maṇi yeṉṟo
maṉattuṇiṉaippilaṉeṉṟo malaruṇṭa makāntam pa
ṉey . Ivaiyum veḷāṉ cāttaṉ colliṉa . Ivaiyum ṇṭu Innāṭā
ḷu nāṭṭu nācakaṉmār . §
Digital edition of SII 30.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
